seoTitle: Sir Samuel vs Smith Brook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sir Samuel and Smith Brook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sir Samuel vs Smith Brook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sir Samuel and Smith Brook.
heading: Sir Samuel vs Smith Brook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sir Samuel, Western Australia and Smith Brook, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sir Samuel has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Smith Brook (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sir Samuel or Smith Brook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sir Samuel has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Smith Brook scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sir Samuel scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Smith Brook scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sir Samuel or Smith Brook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sir Samuel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
